title: The newest Instagram “exploit” is the goofiest I've seen
author: ssiddharth
aiHeadline: Instagram users discover the most absurd 'exploit' yet: accidentally taking over their own accounts while trying to post a selfie of their cat mid-air, because of course, Meta would make that the highlight feature.

title: Malicious npm packages detected across Red Hat Cloud Services
author: kurmiashish
aiHeadline: Red Hat Cloud Services: where your npm packages are now the real villains in this cybersecurity horror movie, complete with a plot twist where the 'updates' are actually the ones stealing the show—and your data.

title: A 10 year old Xeon is all you need
author: cafkafk
aiHeadline: Pro tip: If you're still running a 2016 Xeon, congratulations! You've officially unlocked the 'Old School Overclocker' achievement, proving that sometimes, the best tech is the one that doesn't need to be replaced every six months.

title: The Pirate Bay Remains Resilient, 20 Years After the Raid
author: speckx
aiHeadline: The Pirate Bay: still here, still pirating, still somehow managing to outlast every legal crackdown, copyright notice, and moral judgment—because when you're 20 years old and still acting like a rebellious teenager, who are we to judge?

title: Anthropic confidentially submits draft S-1 to the SEC
author: surprisetalk
aiHeadline: Anthropic submits their draft S-1 to the SEC, but don't worry, they're keeping it under wraps—because nothing says 'trust us' like a confidential filing, right? Except maybe a locked vault with a sign that says 'No Questions Asked.'
